scripts.build: astro build && npx pagefind --site dist && node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(fs.existsSync('dist/pagefind'))fs.cpSync('dist/pagefind','public/pagefind',{recursive:true});const f='public/pagefind/pagefind.js';if(fs.existsSync(f)){let c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');c=c.replace(/import\.meta\.url/g,'\"/pagefind/\"');fs.writeFileSync(f,c);}"
